title: selago spectabilis
intro: Selago spectabilis, also known as the showy-leaved selaginella, is a type of evergreen perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Selago spectabilis is typically used in the form of a topical cream or ointment, which can be applied directly to the affected area to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
